protein_name: Direct regulator of SIRT1. Enhances SIRT1-mediated deacetylation of p53/TP53, thereby participating in inhibition of p53/TP53-mediated transcriptional activity. Belongs to the AROS family. Widely expressed (at protein level). Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: 40S ribosomal protein S19-binding protein 1; Active regulator of SIRT1; AROS; dJ1104E15.4; FLJ21770; homolog of mouse S19 binding protein; MGC52010; ribosomal protein S19 binding protein 1; RPS19-binding protein 1; RPS19BP1; S19 binding protein; S19BP
